subject: Q3 Performance Review — Action Required
body:
Hi team,

Please submit your Q3 self-assessments by Friday. The review portal is open at docs.internal/reviews. Calibration sessions are scheduled for the week of May 5th.

Thanks,
Sarah

subject: Lunch rescheduled — Thursday → Friday
body:
Hi,

Just a heads-up that the team lunch has been moved from Thursday to Friday noon. Same location, Rosario's on 5th. RSVP not needed, just show up.

See you there,
Operations

subject: Invoice #VC-2891 — Due May 15
body:
Dear Accounts Payable,

Please find attached Invoice #VC-2891 for $4,200 covering cloud infrastructure services for April 2026. Payment terms: Net 15. Please remit to the bank details on file.

Thank you for your business.

VendorCorp Billing

subject: Your weekly industry digest — April 2026
body:
Here are this week's top stories in enterprise software:

1. New compliance frameworks published for AI governance
2. Three cloud providers announce pricing changes
3. Open source project hits 10k stars
